get.summary: ListBoxBobbinCosts lists configs with search, filter, and pagination.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across code and name.

parameters.name: activeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter by active status.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

post.summary: CreateBoxBobbinCost creates a new packing config.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: CreateBoxBobbinCostRequest is the request for creating a Box Bobbin Cost config.

get.summary: ExportBoxBobbinCosts exports configs to Excel.

parameters.name: activeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter by active status.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

post.summary: ImportBoxBobbinCosts imports configs from Excel.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ImportBoxBobbinCostsRequest is the request for importing configs from Excel.

get.summary: DownloadBoxBobbinCostTemplate downloads the Excel import template.
GetBoxBobbinCost retrieves a config by ID (includes rates).

post.summary: CreateBoxBobbinCostRate adds a period rate entry to a config.

delete.summary: DeleteBoxBobbinCostRate removes a period rate entry.

get.summary: ListInterminglings lists intermingling records with search, filter, and pagination.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search across code and name.

parameters.name: activeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter by active status.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).

parameters.name: body

get.summary: ExportInterminglings exports records to Excel.

parameters.name: activeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter by active status.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

post.summary: ImportInterminglings imports records from Excel.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ImportInterminglingsRequest is the request for importing intermingling records from Excel.

get.summary: DownloadInterminglingTemplate downloads the Excel import template.
GetIntermingling retrieves an intermingling record by ID.

put.summary: UpdateIntermingling updates an existing intermingling record.

get.summary: GetLookupFillValues returns numeric and text fills to auto-populate CAPP params.

parameters.name: selectedKey
parameters.description: Key of the selected master record (e.g., mc_code, intm_code, pg_code, mbh_mb_costing, bbc_code).

parameters.name: sourceParamCode
parameters.description:
Source param code that triggered the lookup — used to resolve CAP vs DEL variant for BOX_BOBBIN_COST.
Optional; required only for BOX_BOBBIN_COST.

get.summary: ListLookupMasterColumns returns the selectable columns for one lookup master.

post.summary: CreateLookupMasterColumn adds a fillable column to a master.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: CreateLookupMasterColumnRequest is the request for adding a fillable column to a master.

delete.summary: DeleteLookupMasterColumn removes a column from a master.

get.summary: ListMasterOptions returns combobox options (value+label) by querying the registered table.

parameters.name: masterCode
parameters.description: lookup_master_code (e.g., "MACHINE") — used to resolve table_name + code/label fields.

get.summary: ListTableColumns introspects a registered PostgreSQL table's columns via information_schema.

parameters.name: tableName
parameters.description: Table name — must match an lm_table_name value in mst_lookup_master for safety.

get.summary: ListLookupMasters returns all registered lookup masters.

post.summary: CreateLookupMaster adds a new master to the registry.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: CreateLookupMasterRequest is the request for adding a new master to the registry.

get.summary: ExportLookupMasters exports all masters and columns to an Excel workbook.

post.summary: ImportLookupMasters imports masters and columns from an Excel workbook.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ImportLookupMastersRequest carries an Excel workbook to import registry entries.

delete.summary: DeleteLookupMaster removes a master from the registry.

put.summary: UpdateLookupMaster updates display_name, table_name, and/or is_active of an existing master.

parameters.description: Parent MB Head UUID. Optional — omit or send empty to list all spins.

post.summary: SubmitMBHead submits an MB Head for approval.
UnApproveMBHead reverts an approved MB Head back to a prior state.
ValidateMBHead validates an approved MB Head, freezing its cost and param snapshot.

get.summary: ListMbWorkflowLogs lists workflow transition log entries for an MB Head.

post.summary: ExecutePushToHead executes the push-to-head batch for the given period and heads.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ExecutePushToHeadRequest is the request for executing a push-to-head batch for a period.

get.summary: ListMbPushLogs lists past push-to-head batch executions.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Filter by period in YYYYMM format. Optional — omit or send empty for no filter.

get.summary: PreviewPushToHead previews which MB Heads are pushable/skipped for a period.

v1ActiveFilter.description:
ActiveFilter represents filter options for is_active field.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

v1ApproveMBHeadResponse.description: ApproveMBHeadResponse is the response for approving an MB Head.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created (ISO 8601).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated (ISO 8601).

updatedBy.description: User who last updated the record.

validationErrors.description: List of validation errors if any.

isSuccess.description: Indicates if the operation was successful.

v1BaseResponse.description: BaseResponse is the standard response wrapper for all API responses.

bbcCode.description: Unique config code. Immutable after creation.

bbnReuse.description: Optional bobbin reuse count (from Oracle CMBBC_BBN_REUSE).

boxReuse.description: Optional box reuse count (from Oracle CMBBC_BOX_REUSE).

boxCost.description: Optional MKT box rate in USD/box (param CAPTIVE/DELIVERY_BOX_RATE MKT).

bobinCost.description: Optional MKT bobbin rate in USD/bobbin (param CAPTIVE/DELIVERY_BOB_RATE MKT).

boxCostVal.description: Optional VAL box rate in USD/box (param CAPTIVE/DELIVERY_BOX_RATE VAL).

bobinCostVal.description: Optional VAL bobbin rate in USD/bobbin (param CAPTIVE/DELIVERY_BOB_RATE VAL).

bbnReuseVal.description: Optional Oracle CMBBC_BBN_REUSE_VAL — bobbin reuse count for VAL session.

boxReuseVal.description: Optional Oracle CMBBC_BOX_REUSE_VAL — box reuse count for VAL session.

v1BoxBobbinCost.description: BoxBobbinCost represents a packing configuration master record.

bbcrBobRateVal.description: Optional bobbin valuation rate (falls back to mkt for ACTUAL CalcType).

bbcrBoxRateVal.description: Optional box valuation rate (falls back to mkt for ACTUAL CalcType).

v1BoxBobbinCostRate.description: BoxBobbinCostRate represents a period-specific rate for a Box Bobbin Cost config.

v1ListInterminglingsResponse.description: ListInterminglingsResponse is the response for listing intermingling records.

v1ListLookupMasterColumnsResponse.description: ListLookupMasterColumnsResponse is the response for listing lookup master columns.

v1ListLookupMastersResponse.description: ListLookupMastersResponse is the response for listing lookup masters.

v1ListMBHeadsResponse.description: ListMBHeadsResponse is the response for listing MB Head records.

v1ListMBSpinsResponse.description: ListMBSpinsResponse is the response for listing MB Spin records.

v1ListMachinesResponse.description: ListMachinesResponse is the response for listing machines.

v1ListMasterOptionsResponse.description: ListMasterOptionsResponse is the response for ListMasterOptions.

v1ListMbCompositionVersionsResponse.description: ListMbCompositionVersionsResponse is the response for listing composition version snapshots.

v1ListMbCompositionsResponse.description: ListMbCompositionsResponse is the response for listing composition lines.

v1ListMbLustureResponse.description: ListMbLustureResponse is the response for listing MB lusture master records.

v1ListMbParamsResponse.description: ListMbParamsResponse is the response for listing MB costing parameters.

v1ListMbPushLogsResponse.description: ListMbPushLogsResponse is the response for listing push-to-head batch logs.

v1ListMbWorkflowLogsResponse.description: ListMbWorkflowLogsResponse is the response for listing workflow transition logs.

v1ListProductGradesResponse.description: ListProductGradesResponse is the response for listing Product Grades.

v1ListTableColumnsResponse.description: ListTableColumnsResponse is the response for ListTableColumns.

lmTableName.description: PostgreSQL table name for DB introspection (e.g., "mst_machine").

v1LookupMaster.description: LookupMaster describes a named master table available for MASTER_LOOKUP param dropdowns.

lmcId.description: UUID primary key — needed for delete.

v1LookupMasterColumn.description: LookupMasterColumn describes one selectable column from a lookup master table.

mbhStatus.description: Optional Oracle CMBH_STATUS — head status (R and D/Spinning/Boughtout).

mbhLdrPrsn.description: Optional Oracle CMBH_LDR_PRSN — LDR person value.

mbhFinalProduct.description: Optional Oracle CMBH_FINAL_PRODUCT — final product description.

entryStatus.description: MB Costing Suite workflow state (mbh_entry_status). One of DRAFT/SUBMITTED/APPROVED/VALIDATED/UN_APPROVED/REVOKED.

isBoughtout.description: Whether this MB is a bought-out item (no internal spinning cost).

currentVersion.description: Current composition version number (incremented on each validation).

machineFixedTotal.description: Total fixed machine cost. NUMERIC(20,6) as string.

stateReason.description: Free-text reason captured on the most recent state transition.

costProductId.description: Generated cost-product ID once costing has been produced.

costGeneratedAt.description: Timestamp when cost was last generated.

costGeneratedBy.description: User who last generated the cost.

paramWaste.description: Frozen param snapshot at VALIDATED — waste parameter value (mirrors mst_mb_param).

paramQualityLoss.description: Frozen param snapshot at VALIDATED — quality loss parameter value.

paramEfficiency.description: Frozen param snapshot at VALIDATED — efficiency parameter value.

paramDevExpense.description: Frozen param snapshot at VALIDATED — development expense parameter value.

paramPacking.description: Frozen param snapshot at VALIDATED — packing parameter value.

paramMbProdPerDay.description: Frozen param snapshot at VALIDATED — MB production per day parameter value.

paramThroughputPerHour.description: Frozen param snapshot at VALIDATED — throughput per hour; stores option code, e.g. "B".

paramNoOfProcess.description: Frozen param snapshot at VALIDATED — number of process; stores option code, e.g. "D".

v1MBHead.description: MBHead represents a Melange Batch head master record (MEL yarn type only).

mbsCostRateMkt.description: Optional MB rate MKT in USD/kg.

mbsStatus.description: Optional Oracle CMBS_STATUS — spinning status (Spinning/R and D/Boughtout).

mbsLdrPrsn.description: Optional Oracle CMBS_LDR_PRSN — LDR person value.

mbsFinalProduct.description: Optional Oracle CMBS_FINAL_PRODUCT — final product description.

v1MBSpin.description: MBSpin represents a Melange Batch spin detail record (child of MBHead).

machineCode.description: Unique machine code. Immutable after creation.

powerPerDay.description: Optional power cost per day in USD.

mpPerDay.description: Optional manpower cost per day in USD.

ohsPerDay.description: Optional overhead per head per day in USD.

sparesPerDay.description: Optional spares cost per day in USD.

kgsLostChange.description: Optional change-over quality loss in kgs.

mcPoyBobbinWeight.description: Optional Oracle CMM_POY_BOBBIN_WEIGHT — kg per bobbin.

mcTotFxdCst.description: Optional Oracle CMM_TOT_FXD_CST — total fixed cost.

mcBobbinPerTrolly.description: Optional Oracle CMM_BOBBIN_PER_TROLLY — bobbins per trolley.

mcBoxCost.description: Optional Oracle CMM_BOX_COST — box cost per unit.

mcCaptivePerBobbin.description: Optional Oracle CMM_CAPTIVE_PER_BOBBIN — captive cost per bobbin.

mcWeightage.description: Optional Oracle CMM_WEIGHTAGE — machine weightage factor.

v1Machine.description: Machine represents a yarn machine master record.

value.description: The "code" field value stored as the param's text value.

label.description: The "label" field value displayed to the user.

v1MasterOption.description: MasterOption is one combobox entry (code + label) for the MasterLookupField dropdown.

v1MbBatchError.description: MbBatchError records one MB Head's compute failure within a batch run.

seqNo.description: Display sequence number within the head.

mbRefMbhId.description: Referenced MB Head UUID when source_type is MB. Nullable, empty string if unset.

isCarrier.description: Whether this line represents the carrier component.

legacySysId.description: Legacy Oracle system ID for reconciliation.

v1MbComposition.description: MbComposition represents a single composition line for an MB Head (editable while DRAFT).

version.description: Version number this snapshot belongs to.

validatedAt.description: Timestamp when this version was validated.

seqNo.description: Display sequence number within the head.

mbRefMbhId.description: Referenced MB Head UUID when source_type is MB.

isCarrier.description: Whether this line represents the carrier component.

v1MbCompositionVersion.description: MbCompositionVersion is a frozen snapshot of a composition line captured at validation time.

v1MbLusture.description: MbLusture is a master lookup entry for MB lusture types.

defaultValue.description: Default numeric value. NUMERIC as string, empty if PICKLIST.

defaultOption.description: Default option code, empty if SCALAR.

options.description: Picklist options, populated when type is PICKLIST.

v1MbParam.description: MbParam is a master costing parameter definition (SCALAR or PICKLIST).

numericValue.description: Numeric value represented by this option.

v1MbParamOption.description: MbParamOption is a single picklist option belonging to an MbParam.

pushedAt.description: Timestamp when the push was executed.

previousPeriod.description: Previous period, used for carry-forward comparisons.

v1MbPushLog.description: MbPushLog records a single push-to-head batch execution.

reason.description: Reason captured for the transition, if any.

version.description: Composition version at the time of the transition.

v1MbWorkflowLog.description: MbWorkflowLog records a single workflow state transition for an MB Head.

totalItems.description: Total number of items across all pages.

v1PaginationResponse.description: PaginationResponse contains pagination metadata for list responses.

skipped.description: MB Heads excluded from push, with reasons.

v1PreviewPushToHeadResponse.description: PreviewPushToHeadResponse is the response listing pushable and skipped MB Heads for a period.

bcRecoveryRate.description: Percentage of value recovered from BC grade.

lossPct.description: Optional loss factor (param NON_STD_SPECIAL_PROD, from Oracle CMPG_LOSS).

seqNo.description: Optional display sequence number (from Oracle CMPG_SEQ_NO).

v1ProductGrade.description: ProductGrade represents a quality-loss configuration preset.

hasActual.description: Whether an ACTUAL cost value is available to push.

hasSelling.description: Whether a SELLING cost value is available to push.

hasForecast.description: Whether a FORECAST cost value is available to push.

v1PushableMbHead.description: PushableMbHead describes an MB Head eligible to receive pushed costs for the previewed period.

v1RevokeMBHeadResponse.description: RevokeMBHeadResponse is the response for revoking an MB Head.

v1SkippedMbHead.description: SkippedMbHead describes an MB Head excluded from the push, with the reason why.

v1SubmitMBHeadResponse.description: SubmitMBHeadResponse is the response for submitting an MB Head for approval.

v1TableColumn.description: TableColumn is one column from information_schema introspection.

v1TriggerMbBatchRequest.description:
TriggerMbBatchRequest is the request to compute cst_product_cost rows for every
VALIDATED MB Head, for the given period, across all 3 calculation types.

jobId.description: Underlying cal_job id created for this run.

successCount.description: Count of MB Heads successfully computed.

failedCount.description: Count of MB Heads that failed to compute.

rowsInserted.description: Total cst_product_cost rows inserted (3 per successful MB Head).

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the run, in milliseconds.

errors.description: Per-MB failure details, one entry per failed MB Head.

v1TriggerMbBatchResponse.description: TriggerMbBatchResponse summarizes an MB_BATCH run's outcome.

v1UnApproveMBHeadResponse.description: UnApproveMBHeadResponse is the response for un-approving an MB Head.

v1UpdateBoxBobbinCostResponse.description: UpdateBoxBobbinCostResponse is the response for updating a Box Bobbin Cost config.

v1UpdateInterminglingResponse.description: UpdateInterminglingResponse is the response for updating an intermingling record.

v1UpdateLookupMasterResponse.description: UpdateLookupMasterResponse is the response for UpdateLookupMaster.

v1UpdateMBHeadResponse.description: UpdateMBHeadResponse is the response for updating an MB Head record.

v1UpdateMBSpinResponse.description: UpdateMBSpinResponse is the response for updating an MB Spin record.

v1UpdateMachineResponse.description: UpdateMachineResponse is the response for updating a machine.

v1UpdateMbCompositionResponse.description: UpdateMbCompositionResponse is the response for updating an MB composition line.

v1UpdateMbLustureResponse.description: UpdateMbLustureResponse is the response for updating an MB lusture master record.

v1UpdateMbParamOptionResponse.description: UpdateMbParamOptionResponse is the response for updating an MB param picklist option.

v1UpdateMbParamResponse.description: UpdateMbParamResponse is the response for updating an MB costing parameter.

v1UpdateProductGradeResponse.description: UpdateProductGradeResponse is the response for updating a Product Grade.

v1ValidateMBHeadResponse.description: ValidateMBHeadResponse is the response for validating an MB Head.

field.description: The field name that failed validation.

v1ValidationError.description: ValidationError represents a single field validation error.
